seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tickera and Tilley Swamp. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Tickera vs Tilley Swamp: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tickera and Tilley Swamp.
heading: Tickera vs Tilley Swamp — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tickera, South Australia and Tilley Swamp, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tilley Swamp has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Tickera (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tickera or Tilley Swamp safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tickera has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Tilley Swamp scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tickera scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Tilley Swamp scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tickera or Tilley Swamp?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tilley Swamp has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
